pi_items.source: Verified from task description ('Create a new entry with the Test Name Helicobacter pylori Breath Test') and bash script greps (searching for 'Helicobacter pylori').
Verified from task description ('Test Code/Abbreviation UBT-HP') and bash script greps (searching for 'UBT-HP').

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the agent to add a lab test with the exact name 'Helicobacter pylori Breath Test' and the code/abbreviation 'UBT-HP'. Both of these target values are verified by the task description text and the validation scripts (setup_task.sh and export_result.sh) which check the FreeMED database for these exact strings.
